How I Think

Marketing built on
narrative, not noise.

✦
Narrative First

Every campaign starts with a human truth, not a product feature. The story comes first — the tactics follow.

◈
Creative with Proof

Bold ideas backed by data. Intuition validated by results. I know when to trust the instinct and when to check the numbers.

⬡
Brand as a System

Voice, visuals, campaigns — all of it has to feel like one thing. I build the foundation that makes every touchpoint coherent.

Campaigns

Campaigns that shift
perception, not just awareness.

Every campaign I lead starts with one question: what do we want people to feel?

Celebrity Partnership · Clutch

Immanuel Quickley
× Clutch

When brand storytelling meets pop culture.

The moment: Partnering with NBA star Immanuel Quickley was one of those pinch-me moments — the kind that reminds you exactly why you do this job. I led the campaign narrative and rollout strategy, making sure every frame echoed the core message: performance, confidence, authenticity — just like his game.

The result: Fans lit up with genuine excitement. Clutch reached an audience that doesn't think about car buying — and made them feel the brand anyway. That's what pop culture entry points do.

Campaign NarrativeRollout StrategyCreative DirectionTalent Partnership
▶
Brand Perception Campaign · Clutch

Clutch Certified

Changing what people believe — not just what they know.

The strategic problem: Customers loved that Clutch was fast and easy. But fast without quality is a ceiling. Research showed buyers trusted the process but weren't sure about the cars. Clutch Certified was built to close that gap.

The campaign: Every car inspected, reconditioned, and backed. Not just fast — worth it. I led the strategy and execution, ensuring every touchpoint reinforced the same shift: Clutch isn't just convenient, it's a brand you can trust with a big decision.

Brand StrategyCampaign PositioningMessaging ArchitectureExecution Lead
View Campaign ↗
Ad Films · Clutch

End-to-end.
Brief to screen.

Three high-energy brand films that turned the transactional image of buying and selling used cars into something bold, confident, and modern.

I worked hand-in-hand with the agency and in-house creative teams — from brief through to launch — to make sure every film hit that sweet spot: human, witty, and unmistakably Clutch. They're not car ads. They're brand statements.

Annual Brand Campaign · AdaniConneX · India

Kare Bharat Ko Roshan

A campaign that ran twice — because it worked.

Nationally recognised, planned and executed across 2 consecutive years — managing the full campaign lifecycle from creative development to media rollout. This campaign cemented AdaniConneX's position as a brand with purpose and scale.

🏆 Frost & Sullivan AwardGlobal Recognition
Customer Campaign · AdaniConneX

Day in the Life
of a Customer

Every detail designed to feel real.

Led end-to-end — ideation, scripting, casting, on-set direction, post-production. I selected the actors, checked frames on set, and quality-reviewed the final cut. Every detail was designed to reflect real customer pain points and how our product solved them.

Influencer Marketing

I don't hand over a product.
I co-create the narrative.

15+ creator partnerships led at Clutch. From organic-first storytelling to paid education — every partnership has a strategy behind it.

"The brand should show up in the moment — never steal it."

"The best UGC already exists. Spot it. Amplify it. Build on it."

"Match the creator to the message, not just the follower count."

Pillar 01 · Organic-First Storytelling

Abbas Wahab — Clutch's first-ever
influencer partnership — and still going.

The brand subtly steps into the moment — never the hero, just the enabler.

I identified Abbas, built the full narrative arc, crafted scripts and captions, and ensured the vision was clear. The goal: let the product sneak into everyday moments, making it part of the story, not the story itself. Abbas is now a brand ambassador.

📱
Instagram ↗
Campaign 1 · The First
The First

First-ever Clutch influencer collab. Organic, funny, story-driven. Set the template for everything after.
📱
Instagram ↗
Campaign 2 · The Deepening
The Deepening

Built on established trust, pushed the narrative further. Brand presence deepened, never front and centre.
⭐
Instagram ↗
Campaign 3 · The Ambassador
The Ambassador

Continuous partnership. Abbas is now a recognisable Clutch voice — the relationship has become a brand asset.
Pillar 02 · UGC Amplification

She made the content.
I made it a campaign.

Black Barbie bought a car from Clutch and made a video about it — completely organically. I recognised the value, secured amplification, and turned a customer moment into a brand asset. Then I brought her back.

Phase 1 · Earned & Amplified
Real customer, real reaction.

She posted. I spotted it. Secured rights, amplified reach. Zero scripted feel — this is what authentic looks like.

Watch on Instagram ↗ Phase 2 · Commissioned
BTS: The Inspection Process.

Leveraged established trust to go deeper — exclusive BTS of Clutch's car inspection, answering the exact question buyers have.

Watch on Instagram ↗

One organic post became a two-part content arc that served both buyer trust and brand credibility.

The best content was already happening. I just had to see it.

The Employee Creator

A Clutch sales employee with a creator following had a natural production day. Authentic insider content, no agency price tag, all credibility.

Watch ↗ The Seller UGC

An influencer sold their car to Clutch and posted organically. Zero production cost. 100% authentic seller-side perspective.

Watch ↗

These weren't commissions. They were moments I recognised, moved on, and made count.

Pillar 03 · Paid Partnerships

When transparency
is the strategy.

Not every partnership needs to hide the deal. For audiences who want to understand how Clutch works, I matched creators to clear, credible, informational content.

✦ ✧
About Me

Behind the curtains.
Beyond work — Palak.

Brand marketer by profession. Painter, hiker, yogi, and book-hoarder by passion.

By day, I test customer hooks that land. By night, I bring that same creative energy to a blank canvas — yes, I paint too. Whether it's a brand voice or a brushstroke, I bring a twist of creativity to everything I touch.

Beyond the Brief

Life outside the office.

🎨
The Painter

When I'm not building brand strategies, I'm at a canvas. Painting taught me what no marketing course did — how to look at something blank and see possibility.

🥾
The Hiker

My adventures are wild and my views are earned. If there's a hike that promises a killer sunrise or a postcard-worthy sunset, I'm lacing up my boots.

🧘
The Yogi

Yes, I can do 15 surya namaskars in a row. And yes, I still think about chocolate cake mid-meditation. Life is all about balance, right?

📚
The Reader

Books are my happy place. From psychology to poetry, I collect words the way some people collect shoes. Stories that challenge me, words that stick.

How I Work

Planning is my love language.

I'm a die-hard believer that "well begun is half done" — which is why I bring structure to creative chaos and timelines to wild ideas. If you're looking for someone who blends creativity with clarity, can pitch bold ideas and execute them just as fearlessly — I'm your person.

🌀
Structure meets chaos

I bring timelines to wild ideas and clarity to ambiguous briefs. Creative chaos is only useful when it goes somewhere.

⚡
Creative with purpose

Bold ideas, executed fearlessly. I don't just ideate — I follow through, all the way to launch day.

🔍
Genuinely curious

Always learning. New formats, new markets, new authors. Curiosity is the professional skill nobody lists on their résumé.
